programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: After being assaulted and rejected by her family, a woman finds support with a kind man, but societal stigma and emotional struggles challenge their bond and her path to dignity. Release Year: 2000 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
programme.desc: Vishwas dreams of stardom but is mistaken for an inspector by Kajal, and when her strict mother arrives, his double life explodes into hilarious confusion. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.desc: The epidemic is actually Black Death. The gate and the port of the Empire set quarantine stations which cause conflicts.

programme.desc: Evel laughs that the ceremony is a trap to lure out the Steelblood Front. The King orders Inglis to capture Evel.

programme.title: E42 - Doorway To Adventure

programme.desc: Mr Bean makes his own horror movie and ropes in Mrs Wicket as the star!

programme.title: E106 - My Adventures With Mad Science
programme.desc: When Jimmy gets kidnapped, it’s up to Lois and Clark to save him – but rescuing Jimmy will lead them into danger as they deal with mad scientists, military secrets, and relationship woes!

programme.title: E1311 - Don't Press Play/Real Art/Just A Little Patience...Yeah...Yeah/Villains In A Van Gett

programme.title: E107 - Kiss Kiss Fall In Portal
programme.desc: Clark tries to plan a normal date without any Superman problems – but gets interrupted when Mr. Mxyzptlk sweeps him, Jimmy, and Lois into a high-stakes, multiverse-hoping chase!

programme.title: Revolver
programme.desc: 'I'm getting the money I'm owed, why should I prepare myself? ”Su-young, a police officer waiting to move into her dream apartment, gets entangled in an unexpected corruption case. She accepts an offer to take all the blame in exchange for a large reward. Two years later, on the day of her release from prison, the only person who comes to see her is Yoon-sun, a woman she has never met before. Su-young senses that something has gone wrong. Determined to regain everything she has lost, Su-young sets out to find Andy, who promised her the reward, but she soon encounters an even bigger and more dangerous force behind him...

programme.title: Lady Cop & Papa Crook
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Molline Szeto is assigned to investigate the kidnap of a boy, whose father is the kingpin of illegal red oil in Greater China, John Fok.

programme.title: Tales From The Occult: Body And Soul
programme.desc: “Rapunzel”- Has-been idol Maggie had her career breakthrough with a famous advertisement featuring her hair. Though her career has waned considerably, a rare invitation to a movie audition sparks her longing for a comeback. On the night before the audition, Maggie's hair is burnt in a prank at a private party. To ensure that her damaged hair doesn't prevent her path back to stardom, Maggie finds a hair salon in the middle of the night... “Cheshire Cat”- A string of cat abuses shocks the city. Animal protection volunteers Nora and Aaron not only run a home for stray cats; they also go out and save them from the streets. One day, Johnnie, a man who tracks cat abusers, tells them about rumors of infamous cat abuser “Cat's Eye”... “Tooth Fairy”- Dental nurse Sammi ran into chef Hin after an incident on the street. programme.title: E14 - Finito!
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: E120 - Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: E203 - I Know What You Did This Summer
programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: E207 - Krampapalooza
programme.desc: Danger Force sees an opportunity to make money fast by hosting Swellview's hottest music festival, but they catch a case of the Kramps when Krampus threatens to ruin their plans.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E204 - The Summer I Turned Giddy
programme.desc: Upset that Phoebe has a new partner, Max decides to partner with his friend Gideon. But things backfire when Max tries to turn Gideon into a supersized superhero. Chloe's friends pretend to be wealthy so they can bond with her new crush.

programme.title: E114 - Vidja Games
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man get hooked making celebrity 'Holla' videos to start raking in cash. But when making celebrity videos turns into a popularity contest, they accidentally send out a 'Holla' video that reveals their secret identities.

programme.title: E111 - #MommaGoomer
programme.desc: Goomer's mom is coming to visit but has no idea that her son is an MMA fighter. Dice enlists the help of Sam and Cat to help convince Goomer's mom that Goomer is a high school teacher.

programme.title: E124 - Funny Money / Shaking Bad
programme.desc: When Best breaks the last clean plate, rather than do the dishes, Best and Bester head out to buy a brand new one. // Best and Bester decide to make the best milkshake ever, only to find themselves in a bitter contest with Flip Flop.

programme.title: E311 - Ray Forgives
programme.desc: Ray breaks up with Credenza, giving Danger Force only 48 hours to teach Ray how to forgive before his relationship is over forever. If Ray wants a future with Credenza, he must confront his past and learn to forgive his greatest enemy, Drex.

programme.title: E808 - Karaless Whisper / Dollars and Scents
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

programme.title: E7 - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: E8 - I Smell a Rat Infestation
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue of an unseasoned farmhand whose herd of Ostrich are on the loose. Then Billy and Tim save some house flippers from a red-alert rat infestation.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E6 - Western Australia: More Than Meets The Eye
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: E7 - Cassowary
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E30 - Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: E32 - Bumpy And The Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E6 - I Can Be Anything
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and follow their dreams.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E10 - Thomas Makes A Mistake
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: E35 - The Great Pacific Garbage Patch
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: E36 - The Leshan Giant Buddha, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.title: E21 - Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 2026 is a defining year for the government and the nation. As tensions rise across the globe, what does it mean for our security? David Speers and the panel cut though the spin and reveal the power plays behind the politics.

programme.title: E12 - Outback Dressmakers, Nsw
programme.desc: Back Roads is off to a wedding, as Heather Ewart discovers the world of made-to-measure couture dressmaking in outback New South Wales.

programme.title: E71 - Round 11 - Gws Giants V Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: E9 - From Ukraine With Love
programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: E9 - From Ukraine With Love
programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 2026 is a defining year for the government and the nation. As tensions rise across the globe, what does it mean for our security? David Speers and the panel cut though the spin and reveal the power plays behind the politics.

programme.title: E303 - Little Dora's Big Adventure / Bye Bye Balloon
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again. // Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E205 - Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: E613 - End Of The Holiday Part 4
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E113 - Queen Holly / The Tooth Fairy

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E113 - Zeg And The Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: E304 - Singin' In The Tub / Show And Share
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E114 - The Elf Windmill / The Elf Band
programme.desc: Mr Elf demonstrates why it takes so long to make flour, but Nanny Plum refuses to wait, and uses magic to speed up the elf windmill. // Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band.

programme.title: E107 - The Case Of The Big Chomp / The Secret Of The Salt Cave
programme.desc: Who took a chomp out of Bill and Jill's satellite van in the swamp? // Sam and Kit investigate the strange shrieks keeping the bats awake in a cave.

programme.title: E616 - Garden Games
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy have nothing to do, and are bored. Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with. But not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.title: E619 - Fruit
programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: E114 - The Elf Windmill / The Elf Band
programme.desc: Mr Elf demonstrates why it takes so long to make flour, but Nanny Plum refuses to wait, and uses magic to speed up the elf windmill. // Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band.

programme.desc: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge. // Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

Exploring Factories
programme.desc: An entertainment program visiting small and large factories to discover the latest science, hidden artisanship, and enthusiastic people that support traditions of Japanese manufacture.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 8
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant's owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three “Musholan” stars behind bars.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Nobunaga is enraged when Hideyoshi withdraws from the campaign against the Uesugi and returns without permission, placing him under house arrest and ordering his execution. As the Hashiba retainers plead for mercy, news arrives that Matsunaga Hisahide has betrayed him once again. Narrowly escaping death, Hideyoshi and Koichiro enter negotiations with Hisahide, conveying Nobunaga's terms that rebellion will be forgiven if he surrenders his prized tea utensil, the Hiragumo. Yet despite this extraordinary offer, Hisahide refuses.

programme.title: Formula 1 Practice 2026 E15 -FORMULA 1 LENOVO GRAND PRIX DU CANADA 2026 Practice 1
Formula 1 Practice 2026 E15 -FORMULA 1 LENOVO GRAND PRIX DU CANADA 2026 Practice 1
E2 - Meadow of Horror
programme.desc: It is horror! It is murder! Brutal death as well as exciting fights with an exceptional last-minute rescue. And after seeing it – you will know the creepiest spot is actually the meadow in your neighborhood. With stylistic devices from the horror genre this extraordinary nature documentary takes you on a journey following a well-known hero with six legs, red wings and seven black dots through a seemingly normal meadow – but full of monsters.

programme.title: E10 - Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Trouble brews when the team makes the final attempt to reunite reluctant mother Dilla with her new baby Delilah. And Alba, the world’s only known albino orangutan, amazes her friends with her unique approach to termite foraging.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E1 - The Invasion Begins
programme.desc: When the all-female Hollywood pride encounters the Nomads, a new pride of rival males, they may have found the answer to their mating dry spell. But they quickly realize that it will not be a happy encounter.

programme.title: E4 - The Punks Strike Back
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa, and face an even greater threat on the other side.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: E4 - Vanishing Wilderness
programme.desc: Kenya's growing human population is taking land and resources away from wildlife. The squeeze is creating increasing numbers of conflicts between humans and animals, and is one of the biggest issues in African conservation.

programme.title: E2 - Fantastic Frogs
programme.desc: Cape Town, South Africa is home to twenty types of frogs, but many are threatened by urban development. Meet a variety of the region’s species as we follow western leopard toads on their tenuous journey to breed in the city’s shrinking wetlands.

programme.title: E4 - Killer Packs
programme.desc: Surviving the African savanna requires guile and teamwork for species who live in packs. Follow a day in the life of African wild dogs and dwarf mongooses to see how they rely on their tight-knit families to overcome the challenging landscape.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites

programme.title: Hair Curse
programme.desc: Astoria panics because she wakes up in the library every morning. Rose and the others discover her ivy-hair is taking her there while she sleeps. They get a magical shampoo to cure it, but Astoria's hair is always one step ahead.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: The Perfect Square
programme.desc: In this episode we learn that reliable measurement units can be derived from everyday objects such as our arm span and our height. So, what shape are you? A square, like most of us, or rather a tall or short rectangle? Find out and be amazed.

programme.title: Always Believe In Yourself
programme.desc: Finally, it's competition time for the Acro gymnasts as they head off to Liverpool for the British Championships. Harry and George hope to make a great impression, and superstar choreographer Andrew has been called in to fine-tune the boys' performance.

programme.title: DIY Toys
programme.desc: Steve Spangler shows how you can use science to make toys and a mystery can that moves on its own. He creates some amazing bubbles.

programme.title: Making Blood and a Mind-Bending Trick
programme.desc: The doctors show where your blood comes from and Dr. Chris meets a patient going for brain surgery. They try out a mind-bending trick to test the powers of concentration. In the emergency room, someone has fallen off their horse.

programme.title: A Fright to Behold
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts celebrate Halloween by trick or treating with their forest friends.

programme.title: Rock
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko have some solid ideas about what we can make with rocks.

programme.title: The Fishnet and the Fishnut
programme.desc: Some fishing methods, such as trawling, threaten the sea life and the undersea environment. Only the MeteoHeroes can save the endangered sea life and put a stop to an invasive and destructive fishing method.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Carol gets a special package from Brazil-a rare Chum Chum Land piranha needing protection. But it escapes and starts wreaking havoc on the town's ecosystem! Now, with everyone's help-and Flippy as bait-Carol must catch it before it devours everything in its path.

programme.title: Circles Get Around
programme.desc: Did you know you could draw a perfect circle by using your pinky finger? In this episode we introduce basic geometric constructions and explain the importance of fixed pivot-points. Are you up for the challenge? Eric is!

programme.title: Things Don't Always Go To Plan
programme.desc: Acrobatic pair Finn and Kirsten are used to winning medals - they even took home the bronze for Great Britain at the World Acrobatic Championships. But now they will compete as seniors for the first time at the British Championships in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: E6 - Raven Abaroa
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa puts it all on the line for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo to show once and for all he did not murder his wife, Janet.

programme.title: E5 - Breakup Homicide Or Shot In Self-Defense?
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: E500 - Back Street
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: E1 - Friends & Enemies
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: E5 - Breakup Homicide Or Shot In Self-Defense?
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: E7 - A Night Terror
programme.desc: On July 9th, 2018, officers from the Beckley Police Department received a distressing call from a woman claiming that she and her friends had been kidnapped and terrorised at the Travelodge on Harper Road.

programme.title: Wu Yize Road to World Champion
Wu Yize Road to World Champion
E10 - Yadh Elyes (Paris)/Clement Niel (Bangkok)
programme.desc: A meeting with artisans reinventing coffee and chocolate, blending tradition, creativity and boldness, in a subtle dialogue of flavors. Yadh Elyes, master roaster in Paris' 6th arrondissement, offers exceptional coffees. Richard Orlinski is invited to taste rare beans from Tanzania and Panama. Chocolatier Clement Niel has settled in Bangkok, where he fuses expertise and local flavors. Inspired by the Khlong Toei market, he creates a spicy chocolate, the result of meticulous ingredient research, and brightly colored chocolate candies. Clement collaborates with Leo, a local producer, to select the ideal Thai cocoa beans, combining floral notes and cocoa intensity.

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Parlons Eco:2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: E44 - The Bus Stop
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E38 - Alarm Clock
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E10 - Centralpolis
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.title: E13 - Jean Boucault And Johnny Rasse/Plant Memory/Albertas Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Jean Boucault and Johnny Rasse, bird singers; plant memory; Albertas gardens; Don't panic with Charlotte.

programme.title: E28 - Transformation Of An Old Farmhouse
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Perk, Flemish Brabant, to discover the transformation of an old farmhouse into a family home. Everything has been redesigned by Aurelie, the owner and interior architect, to bring light, create new rooms, and especially modernize it through decoration.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: E7 - The Roots Of Backcountry Skiing
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas visit Mount Assiniboine, the birthplace of backcountry skiing in North America. To better understand the sport's origins, they meet Claude Duchesne, who takes them on a journey through time.

programme.title: E37 - Azay-Le-Ferron - La Guerche
programme.desc: The Chateau of Azay-le-Ferron is a true architectural chameleon, with influences ranging from the 15th to the 20th centuries. Built to defend and impress, the Chateau of La Guerche was partially cut down during the French Revolution.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

E755
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E1293
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!

They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: Naughty Boys
programme.desc: Four sworn brothers failed heist and get into jail for years. Sheng is set free. The three ask Sheng to get the hidden loot and wait for their eventual reunion. Sheng discovers the loot has disappeared but the other three are convinced Sheng has stolen it. Sheng has to escape. His childhood lover Chuan tries to help him to go overseas but is hurt when Sheng falls for insurance detective Bonnie. Sheng and Bonnie buy tickets from Liang who is left holding the bag when his boss absconds with the money...

programme.desc: Adventurer Flynn Carsen receives a secret map to King Solomon's Mines. When the map is stolen, Flynn sets out to find the map and the Key of Solomon's book, without which the map is useless anyway.

programme.desc: When Raj, a happy-go-lucky orphan, learns that he is the illegitimate son of successful businessman Rajesh Mittal, he travels to the UK to claim his rightful place in the family. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.desc: Rick takes a trip down the rabbit hole after a seller hops in with a first edition of 'Alice's Adventures in Wonderland.' Can it make Rick grin like the Cheshire Cat, or drive him mad?

programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: E245 - The Ufo Superhighway
programme.desc: Along the Earth's north 37th parallel, there have been so many reports of UFO's that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway. Is there something about this latitude attracting extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: E387 - Evel Empire
programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump-and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.title: E17 - Junkyard Meltdown
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: E6 - Down To The Wire
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours-and the hunters must adjust to stay ahead. Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: E8 - Unfinished Business
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.
